description: Overhead hero of a square chocolate brownie studded with dark chocolate chunks and a hint of red strawberry filling visible at the top edge, on a white round plate.
Three-quarter view of the same chocolate-chunk brownie with a strawberry compote stripe peeking from the back edge, fudgy crumb visible on the side, on a white riser.
Angled hero of a square fudgy brownie topped with a glossy Nutella swirl and a curled brownie shaving garnish, soft shadow on a white round riser.
Overhead hero of the Nutella-topped brownie centered on a white plate, dense dark crumb framed by a pool of milk chocolate spread.
Tight three-quarter hero of the Nutella-glazed brownie showing the dense layered crumb on the side and a brownie curl atop the chocolate spread.
Square chocolate brownie topped with a glossy dark ganache pool and a Dark Fantasy sandwich cookie, shot top-down on a round white plate.
Same Dark Fantasy cookie brownie viewed from a low three-quarter angle, showing dense fudgy crumb sides and glossy chocolate pool topping.
Top-down view of a square chocolate brownie with shiny dark ganache and a centered Dark Fantasy sandwich cookie on a white round board.
Square chocolate brownie decorated with a thick dark chocolate piped scribble on top, captured flat-lay on a white round plate.
Three-quarter angle of the dark-chocolate-drizzled brownie with a moist crumb edge and visible red specks, on a white round pedestal.
Square golden-yellow blondie drizzled with white chocolate, shot from above on a round gold cake board.
Three-quarter view of the same butterscotch blondie with white chocolate drizzle, glossy gold board reflecting the dessert.
Side-angled hero shot of a butterscotch blondie with white chocolate web drizzle, dense pale crumb, on a reflective gold board.
Top-down view of a deep red velvet brownie criss-crossed with white chocolate drizzle on a round gold cake board.
Three-quarter view of the red velvet brownie revealing a creamy interior layer beneath the white-chocolate-drizzled red top.
Side hero of the red velvet brownie with white chocolate web on top, showing rich red crumb on a glossy gold round board.

Top-down lifestyle spread on an engraved round wooden board featuring three groups of bite-sized cookies (red strawberry, dark chocolate, and golden chocolate-chip) arranged around a small cup of glossy chocolate dip on a clean white backdrop.

Overhead lifestyle shot of mini cookie trios (pink-red, brown chocolate, and golden chocolate-chip) clustered on a wooden board beside two ramekins of melted chocolate, brightly lit with soft shadows.
Detail close-up of a single golden cookie topped with a glossy chocolate ganache pool and a Ferrero Rocher chunk garnish, photographed on a rustic wooden board.
Hero overhead view of one cracked-edge cookie with a creamy chocolate ganache dollop and broken Ferrero Rocher piece on a small white round plate against a clean white backdrop.
Slightly angled hero of the same chocolate-topped cookie with Rocher curl, glossy ganache catching soft studio light on a white plate.
Tighter hero of the chocolate-ganache topped cookie with Ferrero garnish, showing the crisp golden cookie edges and smooth chocolate swirl, plated on white.
Flat-lay hero of a single rich brown double-chocolate-chip cookie centered on a gold mirrored cake board with bright clean lighting.
Three-quarter angled hero of one thick brown chocolate-chip cookie on a white round riser, soft shadow showcasing the craggy fudgy texture.
Overhead hero of a classic golden chocolate-chip cookie with melty dark chips on a white round plate against a clean grey-white background.
Three-quarter angled hero of a domed golden chocolate-chip cookie on a white riser, lit to highlight the chunky chocolate chips and crisp edges.
Angled hero of a thick brown double-chocolate cookie on a white riser, deep cracks revealing fudgy interior with embedded chips.
Overhead hero of a Biscoff cookie sandwich with a smear of caramel-coloured Lotus spread and a stamped Biscoff biscuit on top, plated on white.
Three-quarter angled hero of the same Biscoff-topped cookie showing the layered Lotus biscuit and creamy spread, soft studio lighting on white riser.
Slightly angled overhead of a chocolate cupcake in a fluted red liner topped with a swirl of chocolate buttercream and chocolate-chip garnish, on a white riser.
Vertical hero of a chocolate cupcake in red ridged liner crowned with a tall chocolate frosting swirl and scattered chocolate chips, soft white background.
Eye-level hero of the same chocolate-frosted chocolate cupcake in red wrapper, frosting peaked with chocolate chips, on a white round riser.
Vertical hero of a chocolate cupcake in red liner with a generous chocolate buttercream swirl topped with mini chocolate chips, clean white studio backdrop.
Vertical hero of a red velvet cupcake in red ridged liner crowned with a tall ruffled white cream cheese frosting swirl, on white riser.
Closer vertical hero of the red velvet cupcake with piped white cream cheese frosting swirl, the red sponge peeking through the ruffles.
Vertical hero of a vanilla-strawberry cupcake in a red liner topped with a tall pink-purple berry buttercream rosette, jam visible at the cake's edge.
Lower-framed vertical hero of the same berry-frosted cupcake with deep negative space above, pink rosette swirl crowning the red-wrapped sponge.
Vertical hero of a red velvet cupcake topped with a smooth conical pile of white whipped cream/buttercream, set on a white round riser.
Lower-framed vertical hero of a red velvet cupcake with a tall peaked white whipped frosting swirl, generous negative space above on a clean white backdrop.
Vertical studio shot of a single red-liner cupcake with a dark chocolate frosting rosette on a round white riser against a soft white backdrop, lots of negative space above.
Tighter vertical hero of the same red-liner cupcake with a glossy dark chocolate piped swirl, centered on a white pedestal with bright clean lighting.
Slightly off-center hero of a red-liner cupcake topped with a sculpted dark chocolate buttercream rose on a small white round riser.
Vanilla cupcake in a red liner topped with a tall pink whipped frosting swirl, vertical studio composition with airy white background.
Vanilla cupcake in red liner with a soft pink piped frosting peak, vertical hero shot on a white riser with soft shadow on left.
Vanilla cupcake in a red liner crowned with a thick swirl of plain white whipped cream, vertical clean studio shot.
Same red-liner vanilla cupcake with white whipped cream swirl, slightly different angle with a white prop block visible to the left.
Cupcake in a red liner with a milk-chocolate buttercream base topped by a dark chocolate piped rosette, vertical studio shot.
Overhead shot of ten mini cupcakes in white paper liners with assorted pink, white and lavender frosting peaks arranged on a round wooden board.
Three-quarter angle group shot of mini cupcakes in white liners topped with pink, white and lavender piped frosting on a wooden serving board.
Vertical hero of a small three-tier chocolate buttercream cake with piped hearts, swags and rosette decoration on a white round riser with airy white backdrop.
Slightly elevated vertical view of a three-tier chocolate buttercream cake with intricate piped hearts and floral details, centered low in the frame for tall negative space above.
Eye-level vertical hero of a three-tier chocolate buttercream cake decorated with hearts, swags and a rose topper on a clean white pedestal.
Vertical hero of a small three-tier ivory white-chocolate cake with piped hearts, pearl swags and a rose topper centered on a white round riser.
Miniature three-tier ivory wedding-style cake with piped pearl borders, hearts and rosettes, centered on a round white pedestal under bright soft lighting.
Overhead shot of a single ring doughnut with glossy dark chocolate glaze and rainbow candy-coated chocolate buttons arranged in a circle on a white plate.
Three-quarter angle of the dark-chocolate-glazed ring doughnut topped with rainbow candy buttons on a round white riser.
Overhead shot of a milk-chocolate-glazed ring doughnut studded with rainbow candy buttons on a white plate, with generous negative space to the right.
Three-quarter angle hero of a milk-chocolate-glazed ring doughnut with rainbow candy buttons on a white round riser, golden fried edge visible.
Overhead shot of a dark-chocolate-glazed ring doughnut drizzled with white chocolate stripes on a white plate.
Three-quarter angle of a dark-chocolate-glazed doughnut with white chocolate drizzle showing the puffy golden fried sides.
Overhead shot of a milk-chocolate-glazed ring doughnut with crisscross dark and white chocolate drizzle on a white plate.
Three-quarter angle of the milk-chocolate-glazed doughnut with dark and white drizzle, golden fried edges showing under the glaze.
Overhead shot of a vanilla-glazed ring doughnut with bold dark chocolate squiggle drizzle on a white round plate.
Three-quarter angle of a white-vanilla-glazed doughnut with thick dark chocolate squiggle drizzle on a white riser.
Overhead shot of a classic glossy honey-glazed ring doughnut on a white plate with bright even lighting and lots of negative space.
Three-quarter angle of a glossy honey-glazed ring doughnut showing the rich golden caramelized exterior on a white riser.
Overhead shot of a glazed ring doughnut dusted with powdered sugar and small specks on a white plate.
Three-quarter angle of a glazed ring doughnut sprinkled with powdered sugar, showing texture and irregular fried edges.
Wide interior shot of a bright bakery seating area with The BakeHouse logo on a frosted Icing Room door, white storage drawers, plant, table, and chairs.
Compact interior view of the bakery showing the Icing Room door with cupcake-house logo, wall clock, drawers, dining table, and vertical blinds.
Bakery office or consultation nook with white desk, chairs, bookshelf, blue notice board, and bright pink curtain against vertical blinds.
Wide-angle interior of the bakery entry showing the frosted Icing Room glass door with logo, white drawers with floral decor, clock, and seating.
Production room view featuring a Blue Star glass-door display fridge, stainless commercial deck oven, whiteboard, and bistro table with chairs.
Wider angle of the production room showing the Blue Star refrigerator, Indulge double-deck oven, whiteboard, bar table, and folding chairs.
Close-up of the illuminated The BakeHouse signboard with cupcake-shaped house logo and pink neon-style script on a black background.
Exterior corridor view of the bakery entrance with the illuminated white BakeHouse signboard mounted beside a glass door and stairwell.
Angled close-up of the illuminated The BakeHouse signboard featuring the cupcake-house logo and pink script lettering on a gray panel.
Pink decorative display wall with floating glass shelves holding framed photos, cake stands, and trinkets adjacent to the Icing Room door.
Wide shot of the bakery's pink display wall with framed cake photos and decorative items on glass shelves, with the BakeHouse logo door at right.
Front view of the pink showcase wall featuring floating shelves, framed memorabilia, faux floral arrangements, and the Icing Room glass door.
Bright interior shot of the bakery showing the Icing Room door with The BakeHouse logo, white storage drawers, indoor plant, dining table and chairs.
Domed golden muffin studded with red berry jam pockets, baked in a dark brown tulip paper wrapper on a small white pedestal.
Same berry-jam tulip muffin shot from a slightly lower angle with extra negative space above, emphasizing the rustic dark wrapper.
Berry jam muffin in a dark tulip liner photographed at eye level, highlighting the glossy red jam pools on the golden domed top.
Top-down view of a domed almond muffin in a dark tulip wrapper, topped with toasted sliced almonds, on a white round riser against a clean white background.
Side-angle hero of an almond muffin in a black tulip liner with golden-brown crown studded with sliced almonds, lit softly on a white pedestal.
Front-facing plain vanilla muffin with smooth golden dome in a black tulip wrapper, centered on a round white riser with bright airy lighting.
Overhead shot of a vanilla muffin with crackled golden top peeking out of a dark brown tulip wrapper on a white round board.
Top-down view of a double chocolate chip muffin with rich cocoa crumb and scattered chocolate chips in a dark tulip wrapper on a white riser.
Side hero of a chocolate chip muffin in a black tulip liner with a chocolate crown studded with chips, on a circular white pedestal.
Overhead view of a plain chocolate muffin with smooth domed top and visible bake crackles in a dark tulip wrapper on a white round board.
Front-facing chocolate muffin in a tall black tulip wrapper with cracked cocoa-colored dome, softly lit on a white circular pedestal.
Top-down view of a square sponge sheet cake iced in white whipped cream with a piped rosette border and silver pearl sprinkles, on a coral-pink board.
Three-quarter view of the white-frosted vanilla sheet cake showing the golden sponge layer beneath piped cream borders and pearl decorations.
Top-down view of a square chocolate sheet cake with chocolate buttercream frosting, piped border rosettes and scattered chocolate chips, on a green board.
Three-quarter view of the chocolate sheet cake exposing rich brown sponge under thick chocolate buttercream and chip topping.
Wider three-quarter angle of the chocolate buttercream sheet cake on its green square board, showing piped rosette border and chocolate chips.
Square lamington-style cake coated in coarse desiccated coconut tinted gray-brown, viewed flat on a round white board.
Three-quarter angle of the gray-brown coconut-coated lamington showing rough textured coconut crust and crumbs scattered on a white pedestal.
Square lamington dipped in golden caramel-toned syrup and dusted with white coconut, photographed top-down on a round white board.
Three-quarter view of the caramel-glazed lamington coated in fluffy white desiccated coconut, set on a round white pedestal.
Square lamington dyed bright yellow and rolled in pale coconut, top-down composition on a round white plate.
Three-quarter angle of the vivid yellow coconut lamington with crumbs scattered on a round white pedestal under even lighting.
Square lamington tossed in pink and white coconut shavings, shot flat-lay on a round white board.
Three-quarter view of the pink-and-white coconut lamington with a fluffy textured coating on a round white pedestal.
Side view of a marble loaf cake on a wooden cutting board with one slice cut showing a dramatic chocolate-vanilla swirl interior.
Overhead shot of a marble loaf cake on a wooden board with a cut end slice revealing the swirled chocolate and vanilla crumb.
Side angle of a golden vanilla pound loaf with a tender pale yellow crumb visible on the cut slice, resting on a wooden cutting board.
Overhead view of a vanilla pound loaf cake with a cracked golden top and a single cut slice on a wooden cutting board.
Top-down image of a walnut-studded banana or carrot loaf cake on a wooden board with a small slice cut to show the moist amber crumb.
Side-angle hero of a walnut-topped banana loaf with caramel-toned crumb visible on the cut slice, on a wooden cutting board.
Side view of a chocolate loaf cake with a tender cocoa-brown crumb shown on a cut end slice, displayed on a wooden cutting board.
